emails.subject: A resume for your consideration
emails.body: A resume for your consideration Vince, Stinson: I gave a talk to a bunch of UH MBA students taking a course on options. One of the more interesting of the inevitable stream of resumes is the enclosed. Perhaps an EBS hire? Grant Forwarded by Grant Masson/HOU/ECT on 04/24/2000 08:18 AM "Matthew Crouse" <mscrouse@hotmail.com> on 04/21/2000 05:06:08 PM
